About This Property

Shambo View is a well-maintained residential complex located in Okahandja, offering a secure and comfortable lifestyle on the 1st floor. This 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom unit is an ideal entry point into the property market or a smart addition to any investment portfolio.

With tenants already in place, this is a turn-key investment opportunity — generating rental income from day one. The unit features a modern granite kitchen counter with built-in hob, tiled flooring throughout, and a full bathroom with bath, toilet and basin. The complex offers a shared balcony walkway with views over the courtyard.

Two units are available at the same price, making it possible to acquire both and maximise your investment return in this sought-after complex.

  • 2 Bedrooms
  • 1 Full Bathroom (bath, toilet, basin)
  • Granite kitchen countertops
  • Built-in electric hob & oven
  • Tiled throughout
  • 1st floor with balcony walkway
  • Secure complex with gated access
  • Tenants in place
  • 2 units available
  • Okahandja town location

📈 Why This Is a Smart Investment

With tenants already in place, you start earning rental income from the day of transfer. Okahandja is a growing town with consistent rental demand, making this unit a reliable asset. The low entry price of N$400,000 and a manageable monthly levy of N$976.29 make the numbers work for both new and experienced investors.

Acquiring both available units at this price point gives you a dual-income property at a competitive total outlay — a rare opportunity in today’s market.
